title: Costa Rica drop players after shooting incident
summary: Costa Rica have dropped three players for an upcoming friendly against England due to disciplinary violations. The decision demonstrates the team's commitment to maintaining squad discipline.
content: Costa Rica have dropped three players for a friendly against England due to indiscipline.

zh.summary: 哥斯达黎加因纪律违规从即将对阵英格兰的友谊赛中除名三名球员。该决定证明了球队维持阵容纪律的承诺。

title: Keown: Arsenal can eclipse 'Invincibles' era
summary: Martin Keown believes Arsenal can surpass the achievements of the 'Invincibles' if they win the Champions League after the Premier League. The claim reflects the squad's potential this season.
content: Mikel Arteta's Arsenal will eclipse the 'Invincibles' if they complete an extraordinary double and win the Champions League, Martin Keown has claimed.

title: Sources: Barcelona hopeful of signing Álvarez
summary: Barcelona is pursuing Julián Álvarez from Atlético Madrid following their agreement to sign Anthony Gordon from Newcastle. The dual pursuit demonstrates Barcelona's aggressive transfer strategy.
content: Barcelona will turn their attention to Atlético Madrid's Julián Álvarez after agreeing a deal to sign Anthony Gordon, various sources have told ESPN.

zh.title: 消息人士：巴塞罗那有望签下阿尔瓦雷斯

summary: Manchester United is close to finalizing an agreement with Atalanta for midfielder Éderson. The potential signing would strengthen United's midfield options.
content: Manchester United are close to an agreement with Atalanta for midfielder Éderson, sources have told ESPN.

title: Hughes leaves Carlisle after play-off exit
summary: Mark Hughes has departed Carlisle United by mutual agreement after the club missed out on promotion from the National League play-offs. Hughes' exit concludes his tenure at the club.
content: Head coach Mark Hughes leaves Carlisle United by "mutual agreement" after they fell short of promotion from the National League.

title: Why are Barcelona signing Gordon from Newcastle?
summary: Anthony Gordon's European goal-scoring record and intensity have impressed Barcelona during their evaluation. The winger's pace and work ethic suggest he can contribute significantly at the highest level.
content: Anthony Gordon's goal return in Europe coupled with his speed, aggression and work ethic suggests there is a lot more to come from the England international.

zh.title: 巴塞罗那为何要从纽卡斯尔签下戈登？
zh.summary: 安东尼·戈登在欧洲的进球记录和强度给巴塞罗那留下了深刻印象。这名边锋的速度和职业精神表明他能在最高水平做出重大贡献。

title: Southampton must be 'very careful' over finances amid Spygate scandal
summary: Financial expert Kieran Maguire has warned Southampton to carefully manage their debt amid the Spygate scandal. The cautionary advice reflects ongoing financial pressures facing the club.
content: Southampton must be "very careful" over their debts and fiscal position, says football finance expert Kieran Maguire.

zh.summary: 财务专家基兰·马奎尔警告南安普顿在"间谍门"丑闻中谨慎管理债务。这一警告反映了俱乐部面临的持续财务压力。

summary: Former Blackburn striker Benni McCarthy has expressed strong interest in becoming the club's head coach. McCarthy's eagerness to return suggests confidence in his managerial ability.

summary: Manchester United are monitoring Botafogo midfielder Danilo as a potential signing alongside AC Milan's interest. The Brazilian player has attracted attention from multiple top European clubs.

title: Bonmati in Spain squad for crucial England qualifier
summary: Spain midfielder Aitana Bonmati has returned to the national squad for a crucial Women's World Cup qualifier against England after recovering from injury. Her availability strengthens Spain's chances in the match.
content: Aitana Bonmati returns to the Spain squad for the upcoming crucial Fifa Women's World Cup qualifier against England after recovering from a broken leg.

zh.title: 博马蒂入选西班牙队参加英格兰关键预选赛

title: 'Least-known' World Cup player gains half a million followers
summary: New Zealand footballer Tim Payne unexpectedly gained approximately half a million social media followers after an Argentine influencer promoted him as the World Cup's 'least-known' player. The phenomenon illustrates social media's capacity to rapidly elevate lesser-known athletes to prominence.
content: New Zealand footballer Tim Payne unwittingly shoots to social media fame overnight thanks to one Argentine influencer's mission to promote the World Cup's "least-known" player.

zh.title: "最不知名"世界杯球员获得五十万粉丝

title: Are Premier League clubs flat-track bullies in Europe?
summary: Premier League clubs have won all 21 European knockout ties in the Europa League and Conference League over two seasons. The winning streak demonstrates the financial and quality advantage English clubs maintain in second-tier European competitions.
content: Two seasons, 21 knockout ties, 21 victories. Has money made the Premier League's dominance of the Europa League and the Conference League inevitable?

title: FIFA subpoenaed over World Cup ticket practices
summary: New York and New Jersey have subpoenaed FIFA over 2026 World Cup ticketing practices, citing excessive prices and reports that fans were misled about seat locations. The investigation highlights concerns about accessibility and transparency in ticket distribution. This could significantly impact FIFA's ticketing policies and future revenue for major tournaments.
content: New York and New Jersey have subpoenaed FIFA as part of an investigation into its ticketing prices for the 2026 World Cup, citing soaring ticket prices and reports that fans were misled about seat locations.

zh.title: FIFA因2026世界杯票务做法被传讯
zh.summary: 纽约和新泽西州因2026世界杯门票销售做法对国际足联进行了传讯，理由是票价过高，并有报告称球迷被误导了座位位置。该调查凸显了人们对票务分配的可及性和透明度的担忧。这可能会对国际足联的票务政策和未来大型赛事的收入产生重大影响。

title: Glasner: Palace now in UEL 'where they should be'
summary: Oliver Glasner departed Crystal Palace after winning the UEFA Conference League in his final match as manager, stating the team now belongs in that competition level. The victory caps a remarkable 12-month transformation of the club. Glasner's exit concludes an unexpectedly successful tenure that revitalized the struggling franchise.
content: Oliver Glasner said he is leaving Crystal Palace "where they should be" after winning the Conference League in his final game as manager.

zh.title: 格拉斯纳：皇宫现在在欧联杯"他们应该在的地方"
zh.summary: 奥利弗·格拉斯纳在作为主教练的最后一场比赛中赢得欧洲联赛后离开了水晶宫，他表示球队现在属于该竞争水平。这场胜利为俱乐部非凡的12个月转变画上了句号。格拉斯纳的离职结束了出人意料的成功任期，该任期重振了这支苦苦挣扎的球队。

title: Neymar misses first Brazil camp after further test...
summary: Neymar missed Brazil's first World Cup training session for further medical evaluations on a bruised right calf. The injury assessment is critical to determining his availability for the upcoming tournament. His fitness status directly impacts Brazil's preparations for the competition.
content: Neymar missed the first World Cup training session for Brazil on Wednesday to undergo "further medical evaluations" on his bruised right calf, the Brazilian Football Confederation (CBF) announced.

zh.title: 内马尔因进一步检查缺席巴西队首次集训
zh.summary: 内马尔因右小腿挫伤进行进一步医疗评估而缺席巴西队世界杯首次训练课。伤势评估对于确定他在即将到来的赛事中的可用性至关重要。他的身体状况直接影响巴西队对比赛的准备。

title: Sources: Barça, Newcastle agree $81M Gordon fee
summary: Barcelona and Newcastle have agreed to a €70 million ($81.4 million) transfer fee for England forward Anthony Gordon. The deal represents a major acquisition for Barcelona as they strengthen their attacking options. Gordon's transfer marks a significant investment by the Spanish champions.
content: Spanish champions Barcelona have agreed a €70 million ($81.4m) fee with Newcastle United to sign England forward Anthony Gordon, sources have confirmed to ESPN.

zh.title: 消息人士：巴萨和纽卡斯尔同意8100万美元戈登转会费
zh.summary: 巴萨和纽卡斯尔已同意以7000万欧元（8140万美元）的转会费购入英格兰前锋安东尼·戈登。这笔交易是巴萨加强进攻力量的重大收购。戈登的转会标志着这支西班牙豪门的重大投资。

title: Putellas closes Barça chapter: 'I gave my all'
summary: Barcelona captain Alexia Putellas bid farewell to teammates and fans before the club's final match of the season. Her departure marks the end of a significant era for the women's football star. The exit concludes a notable chapter in Barcelona women's football history.
content: Barcelona captain Alexia Putellas bid farewell to her teammates and fans on Wednesday before the final match of the season.

zh.title: 普特埃拉斯结束巴萨篇章："我尽了全力"
zh.summary: 巴萨队长阿莱克西亚·普特埃拉斯在俱乐部本赛季最后一场比赛前向队友和球迷告别。她的离开标志着这位女足明星一个重要时代的结束。这次告别为巴萨女足历史上的一个重要篇章画上了句号。

title: MLS-worst Union fire coach Carnell, SD amid slump
summary: The Philadelphia Union fired coach Bradley Carnell while sitting in last place in MLS, announcing Jon Scheer as the new sporting director. The moves represent a front-office overhaul aimed at reversing the team's poor performance. The changes signal an attempt to rebuild the struggling franchise.
content: The last-place Philadelphia Union fired coach Bradley Carnell on Wednesday as part of a front-office overhaul that included naming Jon Scheer as sporting director.

zh.title: MLS垫底的费城联合炒掉教练卡内尔，任命新体育总监
zh.summary: 垫底的费城联合队在MLS中解雇了教练布拉德利·卡内尔，宣布乔恩·谢尔为新的体育总监。这些举措代表了球队管理层的改组，旨在扭转球队糟糕的表现。这些变化标志着这支陷入困境的特许经营权试图进行重建。

title: USMNT's Richards on bench for Conf. League final
summary: USMNT defender Chris Richards was an unused substitute in Crystal Palace's UEFA Conference League final victory against Rayo Vallecano. His limited playing time raises questions about his role despite the team's trophy triumph. The result caps an impressive European run for Palace.
content: USMNT defender Chris Richards was an unused substitute as Crystal Palace won the UEFA Conference League final against Rayo Vallecano on Wednesday.

zh.title: 美国队Richards在欧协杯决赛中坐冷板凳
zh.summary: 美国国家队后卫Chris Richards在Crystal Palace对阵Rayo Vallecano的欧洲联盟杯决赛中作为替补未上场。尽管球队赢得了冠军，但他出场时间有限引发了对其角色的质疑。这场胜利为Palace令人印象深刻的欧洲赛事之旅画上了句号。
